verses.latin_vulgate: Vidi Dominum stantem super altare, et dixit :   Percute cardinem,  et commoveantur superliminaria :  avaritia enim in capite omnium,  et novissimum eorum in gladio interficiam ;  non erit fuga eis.  Fugient, et non salvabitur ex eis qui fugerit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רָאִ֨יתִי אֶת־אֲדֹנָ֜י נִצָּ֣ב עַֽל־הַמִּזְבֵּ֗חַ וַיֹּ֩אמֶר֩ הַ֨ךְ הַכַּפְתּ֜וֹר וְיִרְעֲשׁ֣וּ הַסִּפִּ֗ים וּבְצַ֙עַם֙ בְּרֹ֣אשׁ כֻּלָּ֔ם וְאַחֲרִיתָ֖ם בַּחֶ֣רֶב אֶהֱרֹ֑ג לֹֽא־יָנ֤וּס לָהֶם֙ נָ֔ס וְלֹֽא־יִמָּלֵ֥ט לָהֶ֖ם פָּלִֽיט׃
verses.king_james: I saw the Lord standing upon the altar: and he said, Smite the lintel of the door, that the posts may shake: and cut them in the head, all of them; and I will slay the last of them with the sword: he that fleeth of them shall not flee away, and he that escapeth of them shall not be delivered.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si descenderint usque ad infernum,  inde manus mea educet eos ;  et si ascenderint usque in cælum,  inde detraham eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִם־יַחְתְּר֣וּ בִשְׁא֔וֹל מִשָּׁ֖ם יָדִ֣י תִקָּחֵ֑ם וְאִֽם־יַעֲלוּ֙ הַשָּׁמַ֔יִם מִשָּׁ֖ם אוֹרִידֵֽם׃
verses.king_james: Though they dig into hell, thence shall mine hand take them; though they climb up to heaven, thence will I bring them down:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et si absconditi fuerint in vertice Carmeli,  inde scrutans auferam eos ;  et si celaverint se ab oculis meis in profundo maris,  ibi mandabo serpenti, et mordebit eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִם־יֵחָֽבְאוּ֙ בְּרֹ֣אשׁ הַכַּרְמֶ֔ל מִשָּׁ֥ם אֲחַפֵּ֖שׂ וּלְקַחְתִּ֑ים וְאִם־יִסָּ֨תְר֜וּ מִנֶּ֤גֶד עֵינַי֙ בְּקַרְקַ֣ע הַיָּ֔ם מִשָּׁ֛ם אֲצַוֶּ֥ה אֶת־הַנָּחָ֖שׁ וּנְשָׁכָֽם׃
verses.king_james: And though they hide themselves in the top of Carmel, I will search and take them out thence; and though they be hid from my sight in the bottom of the sea, thence will I command the serpent, and he shall bite them:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et si abierint in captivitatem coram inimicis suis,  ibi mandabo gladio, et occidet eos :  et ponam oculos meos super eos in malum,  et non in bonum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִם־יֵלְכ֤וּ בַשְּׁבִי֙ לִפְנֵ֣י אֹֽיְבֵיהֶ֔ם מִשָּׁ֛ם אֲצַוֶּ֥ה אֶת־הַחֶ֖רֶב וַהֲרָגָ֑תַם וְשַׂמְתִּ֨י עֵינִ֧י עֲלֵיהֶ֛ם לְרָעָ֖ה וְלֹ֥א לְטוֹבָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And though they go into captivity before their enemies, thence will I command the sword, and it shall slay them: and I will set mine eyes upon them for evil, and not for good.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et Dominus Deus exercituum, qui tangit terram, et tabescet,  et lugebunt omnes habitantes in ea :  et ascendet sicut rivus omnis,  et defluet sicut fluvius Ægypti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאדֹנָ֨י יֱהֹוִ֜ה הַצְּבָא֗וֹת הַנּוֹגֵ֤עַ בָּאָ֙רֶץ֙ וַתָּמ֔וֹג וְאָבְל֖וּ כׇּל־י֣וֹשְׁבֵי בָ֑הּ וְעָלְתָ֤ה כַיְאֹר֙ כֻּלָּ֔הּ וְשָׁקְעָ֖ה כִּיאֹ֥ר מִצְרָֽיִם׃
verses.king_james: And the Lord God of hosts is he that toucheth the land, and it shall melt, and all that dwell therein shall mourn: and it shall rise up wholly like a flood; and shall be drowned, as by the flood of Egypt.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui ædificat in cælo ascensionem suam,  et fasciculum suum super terram fundavit ;  qui vocat aquas maris,  et effundit eas super faciem terræ :  Dominus nomen ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַבּוֹנֶ֤ה בַשָּׁמַ֙יִם֙ מַעֲלוֹתָ֔ו וַאֲגֻדָּת֖וֹ עַל־אֶ֣רֶץ יְסָדָ֑הּ הַקֹּרֵ֣א לְמֵֽי־הַיָּ֗ם וַֽיִּשְׁפְּכֵ֛ם עַל־פְּנֵ֥י הָאָ֖רֶץ יְהֹוָ֥ה שְׁמֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: It is he that buildeth his stories in the heaven, and hath founded his troop in the earth; he that calleth for the waters of the sea, and poureth them out upon the face of the earth: The Lord is his name.

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid non ut filii Æthiopum  vos estis mihi, filii Israël ? ait Dominus.  Numquid non Israël ascendere feci de terra Ægypti,  et Palæstinos de Cappadocia,  et Syros de Cyrene ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲל֣וֹא כִבְנֵי֩ כֻשִׁיִּ֨ים אַתֶּ֥ם לִ֛י בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֑ה הֲל֣וֹא אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל הֶעֱלֵ֙יתִי֙ מֵאֶ֣רֶץ מִצְרַ֔יִם וּפְלִשְׁתִּיִּ֥ים מִכַּפְתּ֖וֹר וַאֲרָ֥ם מִקִּֽיר׃
verses.king_james: Are ye not as children of the Ethiopians unto me, O children of Israel? saith the Lord. Have not I brought up Israel out of the land of Egypt? and the Philistines from Caphtor, and the Syrians from Kir?

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce oculi Domini Dei super regnum peccans :  et conteram illud a facie terræ ;  verumtamen conterens non conteram domum Jacob,  dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֞ה עֵינֵ֣י ׀ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֗ה בַּמַּמְלָכָה֙ הַֽחַטָּאָ֔ה וְהִשְׁמַדְתִּ֣י אֹתָ֔הּ מֵעַ֖ל פְּנֵ֣י הָאֲדָמָ֑ה אֶ֗פֶס כִּ֠י לֹ֣א הַשְׁמֵ֥יד אַשְׁמִ֛יד אֶת־בֵּ֥ית יַעֲקֹ֖ב נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Behold, the eyes of the Lord God are upon the sinful kingdom, and I will destroy it from off the face of the earth; saving that I will not utterly destroy the house of Jacob, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce enim mandabo ego,  et concutiam in omnibus gentibus domum Israël,  sicut concutitur triticum in cribro,  et non cadet lapillus super terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־הִנֵּ֤ה אָֽנֹכִי֙ מְצַוֶּ֔ה וַהֲנִע֥וֹתִי בְכׇֽל־הַגּוֹיִ֖ם אֶת־בֵּ֣ית יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל כַּאֲשֶׁ֤ר יִנּ֙וֹעַ֙ בַּכְּבָרָ֔ה וְלֹֽא־יִפּ֥וֹל צְר֖וֹר אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: For, lo, I will command, and I will sift the house of Israel among all nations, like as corn is sifted in a sieve, yet shall not the least grain fall upon the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: In gladio morientur omnes peccatores populi mei,  qui dicunt : Non appropinquabit,  et non veniet super nos malum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּחֶ֣רֶב יָמ֔וּתוּ כֹּ֖ל חַטָּאֵ֣י עַמִּ֑י הָאֹמְרִ֗ים לֹֽא־תַגִּ֧ישׁ וְתַקְדִּ֛ים בַּעֲדֵ֖ינוּ הָרָעָֽה׃
verses.king_james: All the sinners of my people shall die by the sword, which say, The evil shall not overtake nor prevent us.

verses.latin_vulgate: In die illa suscitabo tabernaculum David, quod cecidit :  et reædificabo aperturas murorum ejus,  et ea quæ corruerant instaurabo :  et reædificabo illud sicut in diebus antiquis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֔וּא אָקִ֛ים אֶת־סֻכַּ֥ת דָּוִ֖יד הַנֹּפֶ֑לֶת וְגָדַרְתִּ֣י אֶת־פִּרְצֵיהֶ֗ן וַהֲרִֽסֹתָיו֙ אָקִ֔ים וּבְנִיתִ֖יהָ כִּימֵ֥י עוֹלָֽם׃
verses.king_james: In that day will I raise up the tabernacle of David that is fallen, and close up the breaches thereof; and I will raise up his ruins, and I will build it as in the days of old:

verses.latin_vulgate: ut possideant reliquias Idumææ, et omnes nationes :  eo quod invocatum sit nomen meum super eos,  dicit Dominus faciens hæc.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְמַ֨עַן יִֽירְשׁ֜וּ אֶת־שְׁאֵרִ֤ית אֱדוֹם֙ וְכׇל־הַגּוֹיִ֔ם אֲשֶׁר־נִקְרָ֥א שְׁמִ֖י עֲלֵיהֶ֑ם נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֖ה עֹ֥שֶׂה זֹּֽאת׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: That they may possess the remnant of Edom, and of all the heathen, which are called by my name, saith the Lord that doeth this.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce dies veniunt, dicit Dominus,  et comprehendet arator messorem,  et calcator uvæ mittentem semen :  et stillabunt montes dulcedinem,  et omnes colli culti erunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֨ה יָמִ֤ים בָּאִים֙ נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֔ה וְנִגַּ֤שׁ חוֹרֵשׁ֙ בַּקֹּצֵ֔ר וְדֹרֵ֥ךְ עֲנָבִ֖ים בְּמֹשֵׁ֣ךְ הַזָּ֑רַע וְהִטִּ֤יפוּ הֶֽהָרִים֙ עָסִ֔יס וְכׇל־הַגְּבָע֖וֹת תִּתְמוֹגַֽגְנָה׃
verses.king_james: Behold, the days come, saith the Lord, that the plowman shall overtake the reaper, and the treader of grapes him that soweth seed; and the mountains shall drop sweet wine, and all the hills shall melt.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et convertam captivitatem populi mei Israël ;  et ædificabunt civitates desertas, et inhabitabunt ;  et plantabunt vineas, et bibent vinum earum,  et facient hortos, et comedent fructus eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשַׁבְתִּי֮ אֶת־שְׁב֣וּת עַמִּ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵל֒ וּבָנ֞וּ עָרִ֤ים נְשַׁמּוֹת֙ וְיָשָׁ֔בוּ וְנָטְע֣וּ כְרָמִ֔ים וְשָׁת֖וּ אֶת־יֵינָ֑ם וְעָשׂ֣וּ גַנּ֔וֹת וְאָכְל֖וּ אֶת־פְּרִיהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: And I will bring again the captivity of my people of Israel, and they shall build the waste cities, and inhabit them; and they shall plant vineyards, and drink the wine thereof; they shall also make gardens, and eat the fruit of them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et plantabo eos super humum suam,  et non evellam eos ultra de terra sua, quam dedi eis,  dicit Dominus Deus tuus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּנְטַעְתִּ֖ים עַל־אַדְמָתָ֑ם וְלֹ֨א יִנָּתְשׁ֜וּ ע֗וֹד מֵעַ֤ל אַדְמָתָם֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר נָתַ֣תִּי לָהֶ֔ם אָמַ֖ר יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: And I will plant them upon their land, and they shall no more be pulled up out of their land which I have given them, saith the Lord thy God.
